lambda.function.imageconfig.CfnAbout: Configuration values that override the container image Dockerfile settings. See [Container settings](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/lambda/latest/dg/images-create.html

lambda.function.imageconfig.Command.Description: Specifies parameters that you want to pass in with ENTRYPOINT.

lambda.function.imageconfig.EntryPoint.Description: Specifies the entry point to their application, which is typically the location of the runtime executable.
